Tests for JavaScript functionality and Rocky API features in Pebble firmware, with a build script for unit tests.


## Files
- **[test_jerry_port_common.h](test_jerry_port_common.h.md)**: Header file for tracking call counts of heap analytics functions in a testing environment.
- **[test_js.c](test_js.c.md)**: Tests for JavaScript functionality in the Pebble firmware, including memory management and graphics operations.
- **[test_rocky_api_app_message.c](test_rocky_api_app_message.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API app message functionality, including message handling, connection management, and error scenarios.
- **[test_rocky_api_console.c](test_rocky_api_console.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API console functions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_rocky_api_datetime.c](test_rocky_api_datetime.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API datetime functionality in the Pebble firmware using JerryScript.
- **[test_rocky_api_global.c](test_rocky_api_global.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API global functions in the Pebble firmware, including event handling and initialization.
- **[test_rocky_api_graphics.c](test_rocky_api_graphics.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API graphics functionality in the Pebble firmware, including mock implementations and validation of drawing operations.
- **[test_rocky_api_graphics_color.c](test_rocky_api_graphics_color.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API graphics color parsing functionality in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_rocky_api_graphics_path2d.c](test_rocky_api_graphics_path2d.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API's `graphics_path2d` functionality in the Pebble firmware, including path creation, drawing, and error handling.
- **[test_rocky_api_graphics_rendering.c](test_rocky_api_graphics_rendering.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API graphics rendering functionality in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_rocky_api_memory.c](test_rocky_api_memory.c.md)**: Tests for memory management in the Rocky API, including handling of memory pressure events and out-of-memory faults.
- **[test_rocky_api_preferences.c](test_rocky_api_preferences.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API preferences in the Pebble firmware, focusing on content size settings.
- **[test_rocky_api_tickservice.c](test_rocky_api_tickservice.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API tick service, verifying event handling and subscription functionality.
- **[test_rocky_api_timers.c](test_rocky_api_timers.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API timer functions, including setInterval, setTimeout, and their clear methods.
- **[test_rocky_api_util.c](test_rocky_api_util.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API utility functions in the Pebble firmware, including error handling and date creation.
- **[test_rocky_api_util_args.c](test_rocky_api_util_args.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API utility argument handling in the Pebble firmware, including type conversions and error checks.
- **[test_rocky_api_watchinfo.c](test_rocky_api_watchinfo.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky API watch information functionality in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_rocky_common.h](test_rocky_common.h.md)**: Defines macros and functions for testing JavaScript execution and assertions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_rocky_res.c](test_rocky_res.c.md)**: Tests for the Rocky resource management in the Pebble firmware, including snapshot validation.
- **[test_rocky_text_encoding.c](test_rocky_text_encoding.c.md)**: Tests for text encoding in JerryScript, focusing on CESU-8 and UTF-8 string handling and conversion.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for configuring and running unit tests on the Rocky.js API in the Pebble firmware.
